title: Ana and Ben at the Park
passage_text: Ana and Ben play at the park. They see a small dog by a red ball. Ana rolls the ball. The dog runs fast and brings it back. Ben laughs and gives the dog water. Mom calls them to eat. They wave goodbye and walk home together with happy smiles.

title: Leo and the Kite
passage_text: Leo has a little kite. He runs in the yard with his sister Mia. The kite goes up, then dips low. Mia holds the string and smiles. Dad claps from the porch. A soft wind helps the kite fly. Leo shares his turn, and they cheer together after happy lunch.

title: Nina and Omar on the Farm
passage_text: Nina and Omar feed hens on the farm. The hens peck corn near a brown gate. One hen finds a bug and hops away. Omar fills a small pan with water. Nina counts six eggs in a nest. Grandma says good work. They wash hands and eat warm soup together.
